outputs.description: The login name of the user. This attribute is required to create a user, but is omitted when getting or listing a user. It cannot be updated. CipherTrust.Users.connection This attribute is required to create a user, but is not included in user resource responses. Can be the name of a connection or 'local_account' for a local user, defaults to 'local_account'.
outputs.name: CipherTrust.Users.username

outputs.description: E-mail of the user. CipherTrust.Users.name Full name of the user.
outputs.name: CipherTrust.Users.email

outputs.description: The Distinguished Name of the user in certificate. CipherTrust.Users.enable_cert_auth Deprecated: Use allowed_auth_methods instead. Enable certificate based authentication flag. If set to true, the user will be able to login using a certificate.
outputs.name: CipherTrust.Users.certificate_subject_dn

outputs.description: A schema-less object, which can be used by applications to store information about the resource. user_metadata is typically used by applications to store information about the resource which the end-users are allowed to modify, such as user preferences. CipherTrust.Users.app_metadata A schema-less object, which can be used by applications to store information about the resource. app_metadata is typically used by applications to store information which the end-users are not themselves allowed to
outputs.name: CipherTrust.Users.user_metadata

outputs.description: CipherTrust.Users.created_at Date Timestamp of when the user was created.
outputs.name: Timestamp of the last login.

outputs.description: Date Timestamp of the last update of the user. CipherTrust.Users.allowed_auth_methods
outputs.name: CipherTrust.Users.updated_at

outputs.description: List of login authentication methods allowed to the user. CipherTrust.Users.expires_at Date
outputs.name: Unknown

outputs.description: CipherTrust.Users.password_policy The password policy applies only to local user accounts and overrides the global password policy. By default, the global password policy is applied to the users. CipherTrust.Users.allowed_client_types
outputs.name: The expires_at is applicable only for local user accounts. The admin or a user who is part of the admin group can add an expiration date to an existing local user account or modify the expiration date. Once the expires_at date is reached, the user account gets disabled and the user is not able to perform any actions.

outputs.description: List of client types allowed to the user. CipherTrust.Users.last_failed_login_at Date

outputs.name: Timestamp of the account lockout.
